title: Does Unit 01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin
display_title: Does Unit 01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin
wikitext:
[]: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by Registration » Wed May 26, 2021 3:38 pm We know that before 3.0, Unit-01 was 80m, in 3.0, 13 is clearly taller than Unit-02 and Unit-08. And we barely did see Unit-01 in 3.0, since it was in the space prison or being used as an engine for Wunder. But then in the spear scene or fight scenes, they are in same size, does the movie explain it or it is all brushed off to oblivion?

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Wed May 26, 2021 3:55 pm More importantly, why is Unit 01 corified or why has it's armour turned to core?

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Wed May 26, 2021 4:08 pm wiser3754 wrote: More importantly, why is Unit 01 corified or why has it's armour turned to core?

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed May 26, 2021 4:23 pm DantesInferno wrote: Might have to do with it being used as the Wunder engine. Remember when Asuka is first sent to "insert the plug", some concerned is voiced around the L-field density around the main engine (not sure why this would be a danger for Asuka, but maybe it was so strong that not even advanced-stage Lilim+ such as her could withstand it?). I believe it is the L-field that turns things into core (and lilim such as Fuyutsuki into Tang), as demonstrated by the anti-L system pillar restoring Paris when it is finally activated.

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sat May 29, 2021 5:37 am ElMariachi wrote: I think that the worry was more about Asuka's Eva being turned to core, the same way Unit 08 had its arm crippled by its contact with the awakened EVA-13 to eject Shinji. Unit 02 circumvented the problem by using its robotic arm and immediately ejecting it once the Wunder engine was connected to EVA-01.

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 29, 2021 3:46 pm It's worth noting that when EVA 01 lasers the nemesis series during Q's prologue, it and the interior of the tesseract are pretty red. Either that gradually happened after EVA 01 was speared (and spread to the ground, cause it to be shot up and quarantined, but it was too late...) Or it happened during the actual Third Impact, if we go by the theory that EVA 01 was unsealed during it.

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sat May 29, 2021 6:37 pm Kendrix wrote: It's worth noting that when EVA 01 lasers the nemesis series during Q's prologue, it and the interior of the tesseract are pretty red.

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Wed Jun 09, 2021 9:28 pm DantesInferno wrote: wiser3754#923634 wrote: More importantly, why is Unit 01 corified or why has it's armour turned to core?

[]: Re: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu Jun 17, 2021 2:02 am wiser3754 wrote: Also if it were corified during or after N3I, why weren't the surrounding area and personnel effected?
summary: []: Does Unit-01 grow in size or did Evangelion 13 diminish in size in Shin?             Quote Post by Registration » Wed May 26, 2021 3:38 pm We know that before 3.0, Unit-01 was 80m, in 3.0, 13 is clearly taller than Unit-02 and Unit-08. And we barely did see Unit-01 in 3.0, since it was in the space prison or being used as an engine for Wunder. But then in the spear scene or fight scenes, they are in same size, does the movie explain it
